title: Wand (Brush) Plating
description:
you use very little of this in any one go so it lasts a long time but here is where you can get the wand plating solution - it is for zinc plating only http://secure.workingink.co.uk/shop/working-ink-plating-and-deposition-solutions/bright-zinc/
you can get the  conductive plastic here
http://secure.workingink.co.uk/shop/working-ink-materials/product-is-conductive-carbon-black-filled-hdpe-hi-density-poly-ethylene-30cm-x-30cm/ the zinc can be found here
http://secure.workingink.co.uk/shop/working-ink-materials/100mm-x-100mm-zinc-foil-sheet/
